case_title: MONTGOMERY LYTTON, LLC VS. ALTON LANE INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ALTON LANE INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY LYTTON, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALTON LANE INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 499 JACKSON STREET, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY LYTTON, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ALTON LANE INC. DOES 1 THROUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY LYTTON, LLC SERVED MAY-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALTON LANE INC.
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY LYTTON, LLC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ALTON LANE INC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FRO ORDER VACATING DEFUALT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT NUNC PRO TUNC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ALTON LANE INC.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY LYTTON, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ALTON LANE INC.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $266.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY LYTTON, LLC
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER VACATIING DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, NUNC PRO TUNC FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY LYTTON, LLC
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-21-2025.
